channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: North Korea opens major party congress with Kim emphasizing economy
item.description: North Korea has opened its most important political event in which leader Kim Jong Un is expected to map out his domestic and foreign policy agenda fo...

item.title: From slave roots to Senate race: Allen West bets on Wesley Hunt's Cinderella story
item.description: If you're looking for a Cinderella story in the Texas GOP Senate race, retired Lt. Col. Allen West thinks former Apache helicopter pilot Wesley Hunt m...

item.title: Large banner featuring Trump's face is displayed on Justice Department headquarters
item.description: A large banner featuring Donald Trump's face was hung on the exterior of Justice Department headquarters on Thursday in a physical display of the Repu...

item.title: Mamdani’s Utopian Vision Faces Reality
item.description: The socialist superstar is already threatening to hike the property taxes of middle-class New Yorkers.

item.title: There Is No ‘Moderate’ Solution To The Extreme Immigration Problem Democrats Created
item.description: The New York Times’ The Daily podcast mistakenly interviewed a reasonable voter on immigration last week, so it looks like they’ve swung hard in the o...

item.title: America’s Earliest Outdoor Photographs Shown at Hartford’s Wadsworth Atheneum
item.description: Your critic wanted to see this lovely show so much that he put his contempt for the museum’s trustees in abeyance for a day.

item.title: New Trump administration order could lead to the detention of thousands of legal refugees
item.description: The Trump administration has issued a sweeping new order that could lead to the arrest of tens of thousands of refugees who are lawfully in the United...

item.title: Ed O’Keefe’s Trump Derangement Is So Bad, Even The White House Press Corps Is Laughing At Him
item.description: CBS News’ Ed O’Keefe learned a new concept Wednesday: facts. During Wednesday’s White House press briefing, O’Keefe asked White House Press Secretary ...

item.title: ‘Greatest Country In The World’: USA Hockey Player Promotes Patriotism After OT Win
item.description: Some American athletes may be predisposed to trash their country on the world stage while competing in the 2026 Winter Olympics. But the same can’t be...

item.title: Virginia judge blocks referendum vote on Democrats' redistricting plan
item.description: A circuit court judge in Virginia issued an emergency temporary injunction Thursday to stop early voting on the Democrats' redistricting ballot refere...

item.title: In Politics, Social Media Has Supplanted Experience
item.description: The clip is the product. Governance is incidental.

item.title: Pharma Ad Scrutiny a Test for Free Speech
item.description: Don’t let Washington decide what Americans are allowed to hear.

item.title: Sue-Pervised Retirement
item.description: Rampant litigation against 401(k) sponsors is narrowing employees’ investment choices and eroding their retirement wealth.

item.title: Judge Blocks Virginia Dems’ ‘Unconstitutional’ Power Grab — For Now
item.description: The ruling temporarily halts what RNC Chair Joe Gruters called 'an illegal redistricting scheme that a court has already called a blatant abuse of pow...

item.title: Bringing Back The Talking Filibuster Could Do More To Save America Than Just Passing The SAVE Act
item.description: The talking filibuster is worth trying. It is worth a public accounting of whether this Senate, in this moment, for this American people, can deliver ...
